allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "d:\\test 2\\AI trading assistance"; Start-Process -FilePath "venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "src/dashboard/app.py" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\test 2\\AI trading assistance" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/ai_status" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object active_model, model, available)

PowerShell($body = '{"message":"Say: WORKING"}'; $result = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/chat" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Model used: $\($result.model\)"; Write-Host "Response: $\($result.response.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $result.response.Length\)\)\)")
